_comment_field_ids: Prefill entry IDs from the NEW TFC Google Form. Get them from the form's 'Get pre-filled link' feature, then paste the entry.NNNN values here. Leave a value empty/omitted to skip prefilling that field.
_comment_buildings: Each building's single-letter code (used in the OBS ID) and floor count (drives the contextual Floor dropdown).
_comment_columns: Exact column header names in the linked response Sheet. 'Building' and 'price' are the new columns; the rest of the schema reuses the existing headers.
